derivatives: 【用法】该词既可表示"整体包括…部分",也可以表示"…部分构成整体",还可用于 be comprised of 的结构表示"整体由…构成"。

senses.example: Rural areas have been worst hit by the strike.
senses.example_zh: 受罢工影响最严重的是乡村地区。

senses.example: He lives in the suburb of Beijing and works in the city.
senses.example_zh: 他住在北京郊区，而在城里工作。

derivatives: suburban a. 郊区的;见闻不广的

senses.example: The urban poor are in need of homes.
senses.example_zh: 城市里的穷人需要住房。

senses.example: Parents should educate their children to behave well.
senses.example_zh: 父母应当教育子女守规矩。

senses.def_en: required by a law or rule
senses.example: A nine year compulsory education is implemented in China.
senses.example_zh: 中国实行九年制义务教育。

senses.example: She is a psychology graduate of University of Pennsylvania.
senses.example_zh: 她是宾夕法尼亚大学心理系毕业生。

senses.example: Experience is a school from which one can never graduate. // be graduated with honors
senses.example_zh: 经验无止境。以优异成绩毕业

derivatives: graduation n. 毕业;毕业典礼
undergraduate n./a. 大学本科生(的)

entries.mnemonic: curr(跑)+iculum→课时跑到一块成了"课程"

senses.example: English is on every university's curriculum.
senses.example_zh: 每所大学都开设英语课。

derivatives: 【用法】复数为 curriculums 或 curricula。

entries.mnemonic: extra(额外的)+curricular(课程的)→课程以外的

senses.example: They take active part in extracurricular activities.
senses.example_zh: 他们积极参加课外活动。

senses.example: She placed the change along with the receipt in her purse.
senses.example_zh: 她把找头连同收据一起放进钱包。

senses.example: The pop singer got huge cash receipts from his concert.
senses.example_zh: 那个流行歌星从演唱会中获得了巨额的现金收入。

senses.example: We are in receipt of your letter.

senses.def_en: a social gathering to celebrate sth. or to welcome sb.
senses.example: A champagne reception will be held in honour of the ambassador's visit.
senses.example_zh: 为欢迎大使来访将举行香槟酒招待会。

senses.example: the reception of a new theory
Television reception is very good in this area.
senses.example_zh: 这一地区的电视接收效果很好。

senses.example: Does he find his new celebrity intruding on his private life?
senses.example_zh: 他是否感觉到他最近的成名侵扰了自己的私生活？
